blocked_reason: framework_error stale_ex5: compile_one reported PASS but the repository binary remained byte-identical to pre-repair HEAD blob 208a2e3447aa2880cd7447aaae4ecb0ae32425c8, so the smoke exercised stale code
open_questions: Rework directive: force a fresh EX5 regeneration, verify its Git/SHA-256 blob differs from the retained pre-repair binary before dispatch, and then perform a fresh one-pass smoke. The stale binary's journal showed repeated EA_MAGIC_NOT_REGISTERED failures with garbage symbol_slot values (commonly 572516304); the repaired MQ5 explicitly assigns the slot but was not exercised. This wake did not compile or re-smoke after discovering the stale artifact.
